svg.title: DPT head internals — Reassemble, Fusion, and depth head
svg.desc: Four intermediate ViT layers are tapped, each reassembled into a 2D spatial feature map at different resolutions, fused progressively, and decoded into a final depth map via a convolutional head.

g.text: Early layers → fine texture (sharp edges, material surface)
Middle layers → object shapes and parts
Late layers → global depth ordering and scene layout
